changeSet.author: nicolas
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY IF NOT EXISTS idx_operator_log_tenant_date_id ON public.operator_log (tenant_id, creation_date DESC, id DESC);

changeSet.author: nicolas
changeSet.sql: DROP MATERIALIZED VIEW IF EXISTS public.latest_operator CASCADE;

changeSet.author: nicolas
changeSet.sql: -- Cette vue materialisée garde une seule ligne par tenant : le dernier operator_id -- selon creation_date (et id en tie-break). WITH NO DATA evite le calcul immediat, -- la vue est ensuite remplie via REFRESH MATERIALIZED VIEW. CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW public.latest_operator AS SELECT DISTINCT ON (tenant_id) tenant_id, operator_id FROM public.operator_log ORDER BY tenant_id, creation_date DESC, id DESC WITH NO DATA;

changeSet.author: nicolas
changeSet.sql: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX CONCURRENTLY IF NOT EXISTS idx_latest_operator_tenant_id ON public.latest_operator (tenant_id);

changeSet.author: nicolas
changeSet.sql: CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW public.ranked_tenant AS SELECT t.id AS tid, t.last_update_date, lo.operator_id, row_number() OVER (ORDER BY t.last_update_date) AS rank FROM tenant t LEFT JOIN latest_operator lo ON t.id = lo.tenant_id WHERE t.status::text = 'TO_PROCESS'::text AND t.honor_declaration = true AND NOT (EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM document d WHERE d.tenant_id = t.id AND d.watermark_file_id IS NULL)) AND NOT (EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM guarantor g JOIN document d2 ON g.id = d2.guarantor_id WHERE g.tenant_id = t.id AND d2.watermark_file_id IS NULL)) WITH NO DATA;

changeSet.author: nicolas
changeSet.sql: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX CONCURRENTLY IF NOT EXISTS idx_ranked_tenant_tid ON public.ranked_tenant (tid);
